nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 安东·赖歇诺
nodes.summary: 安东·赖歇诺是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联27种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Striped flufftail、烏干達點啄木等27种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 绿背朱翅雀
nodes.summary: 绿背朱翅雀（Abyssinian crimsonwing，学名 Cryptospiza salvadorii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于安东·赖歇诺、埃爾貢山，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 埃爾貢山
nodes.summary: 埃爾貢山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Elgon francolin、Olive ibis、绿背朱翅雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Abyssinian crimsonwing (Cryptospiza salvadorii), also known as the Ethiopian crimsonwing, Salvadori's crimsonwing or crimson-backed forest finch, is a common species of estrildid finch found in eastern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It may possibly also catch a few insects. There are records of Abyssinian crimsonwing showing breeding behaviour from April and August in Ethiopia, while in Uganda it breeds in March at Bwindi and on Mount Elgon it breeds in June and November

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Abyssinian crimsonwing occurs in forest, particularly montane forest, from above sea level in Kenya, at the forest edge or in clearings where it normally remains among the undergrowth but sometimes seen higher in creepers
